text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Tokai Teio and Mejiro<n>McQueen
skulking in the shade of a<n>tree.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! Let's watch them for a little<n>longer. It
looks like they're talking<n>about our best qualities!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Mortifying. I can't believe that we're
eavesdropping... Just a moment<n>longer.
Understood?
I follow their gaze to find...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Are you even listening? I'm tellingyou Teio's final sprint is waycooler!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
McQueen is far more elegant and<n>graceful! The
way she carries herself<n>is just so radiant...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Easy there, you two! Arguing about<n>whether Teio
or McQueen's the<n>better runner again?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh, Nature! And...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I have access to a great deal of<n>information
concerning the two in<n>question.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Me too! I know all about 'em too!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Aaand it looks like we've got all our<n>experts
here, so let's get into our<n>presentations!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I heard this from Mayano, but she<n>said Teio
anonymously sent<n>McQueen some honey when
she<n>wasn't feeling well.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I have it on good authority that<n>McQueen
possesses a collection of<n>all race footage
featuring Teio. She<n>uses it to study Teio's racing
technique.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Oh, come to think of it, Teio did<n>spend a
whole day speaking like<n>McQueen so she could
understand<n>her better.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
There are also rumors suggesting<n>McQueen
attempted to sneak into the<n>student council office
as part of her<n>research into Teio.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Okay, time for Turbo to talk! So<n>actually, the two of
them are—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: OKAAAY! That's enough!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
How dare you run your mouth with<n>such
falsehoods! W-well, they may<n>not all be
falsehoods, but still!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ohoho? Hold on now, were you two
eavesdropping on us?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Uh-ohhh! Eavesdropperrrrs! ♪<n>Eavesdroppers on
the loooose! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! This is all your fault! You're the<n>one who
suggested listening in on<n>their conversation!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What? You were the one who was all<n>enthusiastic
about it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You're always like this! Doing<n>whatever you
please and getting<n>others involved in your antics!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I never forced you to do anything you<n>didn't want
to! If you've got a<n>problem, then let's settle things
right<n>here, right now!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Ooooh, is this a fight? Or maybe a<n>race?! I wanna
race too if you guys<n>are gonna!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. A race is in order if we are to<n>settle the
score!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
At least, it would be if we didn't have<n>a photo
shoot shortly after this...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Then how about something really<n>quick?! Liiike...
rock, paper, scissors!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Rock, paper, scissors, eh? That's not<n>really...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Nah... That's not gonna cut it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Indeed. I must admit that I'm with you<n>on that.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why not?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Cause if I'm having a showdown<n>with McQueen, I
don't want to leave<n>anything to luck.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I would also prefer to win against<n>Teio by my own
strength.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Strength... Strength... Strength... How's<n>about
arm-wrestling, then?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I guess I'm fine with that. It'd be a<n>quick way to
test our abilities against<n>each other!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Now, now. We don't want to set a<n>bad example
for the younger<n>students by having such a childish
contest.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: If only someone could help ussettle this situ—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Perfect timing, Trainer! Could you<n>come and
mediate between these<n>two?
choice_data_list:
If the battle's important, you should save it for
later.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If the battle's important? Well, I<n>suppose you
have a point, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wait, didn't you guys say that you<n>have a photo
shoot or something?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, the photo shoot!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Teio, we must hurry! We can still<n>make it if we run!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: R-right! Okay, see you all later!
And with that, the two run off<n>together.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Did you really sneak into the student<n>council
office?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I would never! Is it true that you<n>mimicked my
speech patterns?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
They won't admit it, but they actually<n>get along
pretty well...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, they sure do.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right! Now we can battle it out<n>without holding
anything back! Let's<n>do this!

As the two of them have such similar<n>strength, the
ensuing battle drags on...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: YOU TWO! You don't show up at thephoto shoot, and when I come outlooking for you, this is what you'redoing?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Air Groove?! The photo shoot...<n>UH-OH!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
How could this have happened? We<n>completely
forgot about it...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Save your remorse for later! The<n>president and the
others have been<n>waiting for too long already!
Let's go!

And with that, Tokai Teio and Mejiro<n>McQueen are
dragged off to their<n>photo shoot...
